name: Stardew Valley
description: A peaceful farming simulation. Grow crops, raise animals, and build a life in a small town.
reasons: No polytheistic or occult themes. The world is grounded and secular.
Zero gambling, lootboxes, or gacha mechanics. One flat purchase.
Wholesome art with no nudity or suggestive content.
warnings: A saloon appears in-game and alcohol is depicted socially, though it is minor and avoidable.

name: Minecraft
description: Build, explore, and survive in a blocky procedurally generated world.
reasons: Creative, open-ended play with no ideological content pushed on the player.
No real-money gambling. Cosmetic marketplace is optional and skippable.
Cartoonish, bloodless combat against blocky mobs.
warnings: Some hostile mobs use light fantasy elements (potions, enchanting). Easily disabled in peaceful mode.

name: Mario Kart 8 Deluxe
description: The definitive kart racer. Colorful tracks, tight controls, fun for all ages.
reasons: Pure skill-based racing with no objectionable themes.
No microtransactions, lootboxes, or gambling.
Family-friendly art with no violence or immodesty.

name: Tetris Effect
description: Classic tile-matching puzzle wrapped in stunning music and visuals.
reasons: Abstract puzzle gameplay with no narrative or ideological content.
No gambling or predatory monetization.
No violence, no immodesty.
warnings: Heavy ambient music throughout. Scholars differ on instrumental music, so use your own judgment.

name: Portal 2
description: A first-person physics puzzler with a sharp, witty story.
reasons: Intelligent puzzle design with no occult or polytheistic themes.
One-time purchase, no gambling mechanics.
No blood, gore, or suggestive content.

name: Rocket League
description: Soccer played with rocket-powered cars. Fast, competitive, and clean.
reasons: Core gameplay is harmless sport with no objectionable themes.
No violence or immodest content.
warnings: Contains cosmetic lootboxes and a paid item shop. Avoid random-reward purchases, which carry gambling concerns.

name: Overcooked 2
description: Frantic co-op cooking chaos for up to four players.
reasons: Cooperative party play with no objectionable content.
Flat purchase, no gambling or lootboxes.
Cartoonish and family-friendly throughout.

name: Celeste
description: A precise, heartfelt platformer about climbing a mountain and mental health.
reasons: Grounded, human story with no occult or ideological themes.
Single purchase, no predatory monetization.
No violence or immodesty.
warnings: Themes of anxiety and self-doubt handled thoughtfully but present.

name: EA Sports FC 25
description: The football franchise formerly known as FIFA. Real teams and leagues.
reasons: The base football simulation itself is clean and skill-based.
warnings: Ultimate Team is built on card packs, a lootbox mechanic widely flagged as gambling.
Aggressive microtransactions throughout. Play Career or Kick-Off modes and avoid all packs.

name: Fortnite
description: A colorful battle royale with building mechanics and frequent events.
warnings: Cartoonish but constant combat and elimination as the core loop.
Heavy item shop and battle pass designed around spending pressure.
Some crossover events feature immodest or mythological character skins.

name: Among Us
description: Social deduction. Crewmates work while impostors sabotage in secret.
reasons: Simple, cartoonish social game with no occult or immodest themes.
warnings: The core loop rewards deception and lying, which some may wish to weigh.
Cartoon 'kill' animations are mild and bloodless.

name: The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt
description: An acclaimed open-world fantasy RPG following a monster hunter.
warnings: Built on sorcery, magic, and a polytheistic fantasy pantheon, central to the story.
Explicit sexual content and nudity throughout.
Graphic violence, gore, and heavy alcohol use.

name: God of War Ragnarok
description: A cinematic action adventure through Norse mythology.
warnings: The entire premise revolves around Norse gods and polytheistic mythology.
Extremely graphic, gory combat.
The player character is a demigod, which conflicts directly with tawhid.

name: Grand Theft Auto V
description: An open-world crime game set in a satirical Los Angeles.
warnings: Glorifies crime, theft, and murder as core gameplay.
Explicit sexual content, nudity, and strip club scenes.
In-game casino with real-money-linked gambling. Extreme violence and drug use.

name: Mortal Kombat 1
description: A fighting game infamous for its brutal finishing moves.
warnings: Extreme, graphic gore is the defining feature (dismemberment, fatalities).
Some characters use occult and demonic themes.
Immodest character designs.

name: Hollow Knight
description: An atmospheric hand-drawn Metroidvania set in a fallen insect kingdom.
reasons: Beautiful, artful exploration with no immodesty or real-world ideology.
Single purchase, no gambling or lootboxes.
warnings: Mild fantasy violence against insect creatures, bloodless and stylized.
A melancholic, somewhat dark atmosphere throughout.

name: Call of Duty: Modern Warfare III
warnings: Intense, realistic violence, blood, and graphic war scenes.
Some campaign content has been criticized as politically charged.
Lootbox-style bundles and heavy monetization.

name: Animal Crossing: New Horizons
description: Build and decorate a peaceful island life alongside friendly villagers.
reasons: Gentle, creative life sim with no objectionable themes.
No gambling or lootboxes.
Wholesome, family-friendly art and tone.
